meaning: n.(=anaphase)[生](有丝分裂的)双星期,双星体
examples: I hope everyone can pray for the hapless victims in the diaster.
The technical yield is not only determined by the agro-technological level and the diaster resistance ability of human, but also influenced by climatic factors.
In Xiuyan area, the geological conditions are the internal kinetic foundation of geological diaster, and the natural environment and human economical activities are the external factors.
But if it is true then climate change stops being a looming diaster threatening all we hold dear and becomes instead just a minor background effect.
